meta.title: Watch SpaceX launch the final 10 Iridium Satellites
meta.description:
SpaceX will be launching the 8th and final mission for Iridium. This launch will place the final 10 Iridium Next satellites in low Earth polar orbit and complete the constellation. The previous seven missions, beginning with Iridium 1 on January 14, 2017, have delivered 65 Iridium Next satellites to orbit.

Want more info? Here's a complete and simple rundown for you! - https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-iridium-8/
